title: N@buwkadnetstsar #5020
definition:
Nebuchadnezzar = "may Nebo protect the crown"

 1) the great king of Babylon who captured Jerusalem and carried Judah
    captive
nasbUsage:

 1) the great king of Babylon who captured Jerusalem and carried Judah
    captive
